it is the CMS facility internal identifier. Positive value indicates the CMS facility indentifier. Other values include: "-" = the data is averaged to the state, -2 = the data is averaged to the region and -3 = the data is averaged to the whole nation.
11 MDSASIID MDS_ASMT_INT_ID Encrypted D20MDS Assessment Internal ID CHAR 10 Unique identifier for a version of an assessment when combined with State ID.
